title: sorbus arguta
intro: Sorbus arguta, also known as the Ussuri or Chinese rowan, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This deciduous shrub or small tree is native to China and Japan, and is valued for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The plant contains flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Sorbus arguta can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
